s: In 2024, Tyler Ferguson suited up for OAK as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 3.680, WHIP 1.090, SO 62, WAR 0.700.
Changed teams after the previous season (OAK -> ATH).
In 2025, Tyler Ferguson suited up for ATH as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 4.660, WHIP 1.330, SO 54, WAR 0.300. Notable context: Joined ATH.
